headings.usage: Use Black (900) for major stats, Bold (700) for section titles. Condensed feel.

body.usage: High legibility for data tables and lists.

mono.usage: For IDs, Transaction Codes, and raw data values.

layout_strategy.mobile_strategy: Sidebar becomes bottom nav or hamburger menu. Tables become cards.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(227,24,55,0.3)] uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold py-3
buttons.secondary: border border-secondary/50 text-secondary hover:bg-secondary/10 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold py-3

cards.base: bg-surface border border-border/50 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-border/80 transition-colors
cards.effect: Add a subtle gradient overlay (surface_gradient) to give depth without gloss.

inputs.style: bg-black/50 border-border focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 text-white placeholder:text-neutral-600 rounded-sm h-12

charts.style: Dark mode optimized. No grid lines (or very subtle #222). Tooltips must be dark glassmorphism (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10).

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/5 (For Sticky Headers)
visual_enhancers.noise_texture: Add a fixed position noise overlay at 2% opacity to the entire body to prevent color banding in dark mode.
visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use box-shadow for glows, not filters. e.g., shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(227,24,55,0.15)]

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALLATION: The user provided a bare React/Vite repo. You MUST install Tailwind CSS first.
- Update `tailwind.config.js` with the content provided in `tailwind_config` section below.
- `npm install clsx tailwind-merge lucide-react framer-motion sonner`
3. ICONS: Use `lucide-react` for all UI icons (LayoutDashboard, QrCode, Users, Gavel, Award, Bell, Settings, LogOut).
5. MOCK DATA: Create a `src/data/mockData.ts` file to hold realistic dummy data for charts and tables so the dashboard looks populated.
6. STRUCTURE: Create `src/components/ui` for your reusable components (Button, Card, Input). Do NOT rely on shadcn CLI if it fails, just build the primitives using the design rules above.
7. DATA-TESTID: Add `data-testid` to every button, input, and link.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds (use solid #050505).
Use Red (#E31837) ONLY for primary actions (Scan, Save, Alert).
Use Gold (#FFD700) for Status Badges (VIP), Money, and Wins.
Ensure all text is at least text-neutral-400 on dark backgrounds.
The Dashboard Grid must be responsive: 1 col on mobile, 3 cols on tablet, 4 on desktop.
Charts must use custom Tooltips (Dark Glass) instead of default white ones.
Add a global CSS rule for ::selection { background: #E31837; color: white; }.
